games.explanation: CHC is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Jameson Taillon toes the rubber against Freddy Peralta. Cold temps suppress the bats.
WSN is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Cade Cavalli toes the rubber against Adrian Houser.
The market has TBR as a +146 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Drew Rasmussen keeps TBR competitive on the mound against Paul Skenes. Wind blowing out — balls are carrying.
The market has BOS as a +154 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Brayan Bello keeps BOS competitive on the mound against Tarik Skubal. Cold temps suppress the bats.
STL is getting plus-money at +124 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Andre Pallante keeps STL competitive on the mound against Lance McCullers. STL holds a commanding 173-point Elo edge.
TEX is getting plus-money at +125 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Nathan Eovaldi keeps TEX competitive on the mound against George Kirby. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
ATL is getting plus-money at +110 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Chris Sale keeps ATL competitive on the mound against Cristopher Sanchez. Hitter-friendly yard boosts power.
ARI is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Zac Gallen toes the rubber against Max Scherzer. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
